pet_notes: Kittle is a compact premium AI companion inspired by the existing Fireball website guide: flame-shaped head, small dark rounded screen face, Kettles heated orange accent, black metal/glass body, tiny hands and feet, intelligent and warm but not childish. No readable logo text, no speech bubbles, no detached glow, no shadows, no scenery.
style_notes: Crisp high-quality non-pixel mascot sprite, clean silhouette readable at 192x208, orange/black Kettles palette, subtle premium toy/vector finish, transparent-ready chroma background.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `brand-inspired`: Brand-inspired mascot using approved public or user-provided brand cues such as colors, mascot themes, and vibe while avoiding readable text or logo copying unless explicitly approved. User style notes: Crisp high-quality non-pixel mascot sprite, clean silhouette readable at 192x208, orange/black Kettles palette, subtle premium toy/vector finish, transparent-ready chroma background..
